What We Do

Property Solutions,
Built Around People

From short-term contractor placements to longer corporate arrangements, we deliver accommodation that actually works — professionally managed, fully furnished, and hassle-free.

🏠

Serviced Accommodation

Fully furnished, professionally managed properties for short and extended stays. Everything your team needs from day one — broadband, linen, utilities, all included.

🏢

Corporate Lets

Tailored accommodation solutions for businesses relocating staff, housing project teams, or managing ongoing contractor placements. Invoicing and PO numbers welcome.

🔑

Property Management

We work with landlords and property owners to maximise returns through strategic management, letting, and serviced accommodation operations.

Why 3X Stays

The Difference
is in the Detail

01

Book Direct — Save the Margin

No platform fees, no middleman. Booking directly with us means better rates, more flexibility, and a direct line to the people managing your stay.

02

Built for Business

VAT invoices, purchase orders, and monthly billing — we work the way your finance team needs us to. No friction, no chasing.

03

Flexible by Design

Projects overrun. Teams change size. We accommodate that. Direct bookings make it straightforward to extend, adjust, or scale your arrangement.

We needed accommodation for our crew at short notice. 3X Stays had everything sorted within hours — professionally managed and exactly what we needed.
— Construction Project Manager, London
Corporate & Contractor

Accommodation
That Works for Teams

Whether you are placing a crew on a construction project, housing relocated staff, or managing an ongoing contractor arrangement — we make it simple.

📋

Purchase Orders & Invoicing

We work with your procurement team. PO numbers, VAT invoices, and monthly billing all available as standard.

📅

Long-Stay Discounts

The longer the placement, the better the rate. We tailor pricing to your team size and project timeline.

🔑

Seamless Operations

Keyless entry, flexible arrival times, weekly housekeeping, and a dedicated point of contact throughout.

📍

Strategic Locations

Our properties are selected for proximity to major project sites, transport links, and business districts across London.

What's Included

All our properties come fully equipped. No hidden extras, no chasing receipts — one straightforward arrangement.

  • Fully furnished throughout — beds, sofas, dining, workspace
  • Fast broadband WiFi included
  • All utilities included — gas, electric, water
  • Fully equipped kitchen and appliances
  • Washing machine and dryer
  • Weekly linen and towel service
  • Smart TV in living areas
  • Dedicated property manager contact
  • Flexible check-in and check-out
  • Company invoicing and billing support
